classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Protocol contract shared by the Neural Link Bridge and agent-side
 * ConnectionService.
 *
 * A running Bridge must emit this stamp during agent registration before the
 * agent-side service treats the connection as fresh. Older Bridge processes do
 * not know this frame, which lets local e2e runs fail loudly instead of binding
 * stale behavior from a long-lived `:8081` process.
 */
classData.summary:
Protocol contract shared by the Neural Link Bridge and agent-side
ConnectionService.

A running Bridge must emit this stamp during agent registration before the
agent-side service treats the connection as fresh. Older Bridge processes do
not know this frame, which lets local e2e runs fail loudly instead of binding
stale behavior from a long-lived `:8081` process.
classData.name: BRIDGE_INFO_TYPE

classData.summary:
Monotonic Bridge protocol version for agent-side freshness checks.
Bump this or `BRIDGE_PROTOCOL_FEATURES` whenever the Bridge's agent-facing
behavior changes in a way clients must not accept from stale long-lived processes.
classData.name: BRIDGE_PROTOCOL_VERSION

classData.summary: Current protocol capabilities that stale local bridges must prove.
classData.name: BRIDGE_PROTOCOL_FEATURES

classData.summary: Error code used when a running Bridge is reachable but not fresh.
classData.name: STALE_BRIDGE_ERROR_CODE

classData.summary: Creates the Bridge freshness payload emitted to newly-connected agents.
classData.name: createBridgeInfoPayload

classData.summary: Returns true when a Bridge freshness payload matches the current protocol.
classData.name: isBridgeInfoPayloadFresh

classData.summary: Creates a typed stale-Bridge error for ConnectionService control flow.
classData.name: createStaleBridgeError
